evidence.description: All three snapshot constructors use empty_feed() for visibleNoteIds, violating REQ-FEED-021 (current state must be carried) and REQ-FEED-013 (only deleted row removed)
confirm_note_deletion uses note_id as file path argument to fs_trash_file_impl without spec-documented identity assumption
Multi-line YAML tags parser collects all '- ' items in frontmatter regardless of key context; no test for multi-field frontmatter or CRLF line endings
empty_feed() used in all event snapshot constructors; select_past_note wipes visibleNoteIds to [] on every note selection; confirm_note_deletion wipes visibleNoteIds to [] on success and failure
feedReducer.DomainSnapshotReceived overwrites visibleNoteIds from snapshot.feed.visibleNoteIds — receives [] from Rust, clears feed list
AppShell wraps slot in <main>; +page.svelte places another <main class='editor-main'> inside that slot, producing nested <main> in the DOM
<main class='editor-main'> is a direct child of AppShell slot which already renders inside <main>
PROP-FEED-S2-005 test manually constructs expected DOM without mounting +page.svelte; PROP-FEED-S2-006 and PROP-FEED-S2-007 are expect(true).toBe(true) placeholders with zero verification value
No test for confirm_note_deletion behavioral correctness (file path deletion, event payload shape); PROP-FEED-S2-003 and PROP-FEED-S2-004 are proved by cargo-check only (Tier 0), not behavioral tests

builderPointsAssessment.confirmOkReturnsOk: PASS — confirm_note_deletion returns Ok(()) on both success and failure paths (feed.rs:265-270); error communicated via event
builderPointsAssessment.selectPastNoteEventPayloadThin: FAIL — payload carries EditingStateChanged cause correctly, but feed.visibleNoteIds is hardcoded [] (empty_feed), which resets client state on every note selection (FIND-S2-05)
builderPointsAssessment.doubleMainDetected: FAIL — AppShell.svelte:95 renders <main> around <slot/> and +page.svelte:98 renders <main class='editor-main'> inside that slot; nested <main> confirmed (FIND-S2-02)
builderPointsAssessment.frontmatterHeuristicReview: FAIL — multi-line tag parser collects ALL '- ' prefixed items regardless of YAML key context (FIND-S2-03); CRLF off-by-one in body extraction (FIND-S2-07)
